allow: Bash(node -e "const a = require\('jspdf-autotable'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(a\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('type:', typeof a\); console.log\('default:', typeof a.default\)")

Bash(node -e "const j = require\('jspdf'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(j\).join\(', '\)\); const {jsPDF} = require\('jspdf'\); const doc = new jsPDF\(\); console.log\('jsPDF version:', jsPDF.version\)")
